Risk Description: Incorrectly formatted code, unable to run program on different devices
Author: Caelan
Mitigation: Ensure correct formatting before submission, test the upload on multiple devices
Response: Roll back release and distribute working version ASAP

Risk Description: Too high or low confidence levels: false positives or negatives
Author: Caelan
Mitigation: Complete batch testing by using a diverse range of footage and monitoring confidence levels and detection.
Response: Ensure user training is in place, making sure they are aware that false positives and negatives can occur and that manual verification of output is always required

Risk Description: Being unable to meet stakeholder requirements and meet client satisfaction
Author: Caelan
Mitigation: Planning regular stakeholder meetings, presenting completed work and clarifying expectations
Response: Ensure we take all provided feedback onboard and implement swiftly and transparently

Risk Description: Lack of documentation limiting process evidence both for the grading and stakeholder
Author: Caelan
Mitigation: Ensure consistent documentation is developed following the provided task criteria
Response: In the event we are made aware of a gap in documentaiton, appropriate changes or additions to the documentation will be made

Risk Description: Not backing up documentation resulting in loss of work
Author: Caelan
Mitigation: Frequently back up documentation or use cloud services to ensure a separate digital copy is created and can be accessed across devices
Response: Utilise most recent backup and documentation and recreate the changes that were lost

Risk Description: Merging faulty code that replaces working program
Author: Caelan
Mitigation: Ensure each member tests the code before merging, communicating with the group if unsure
Response: Revert faulty merge

Risk Description: Multiple people working on the same branch resulting in overlaps and errors
Author: Caelan
Mitigation: Assign sections to each group member and ensure they focus on one branch at a time, communicating current task
Response: Revert code that has caused issues and work with conflicting code developers to make their branches merge neatly

Risk Description: Having an incomplete artefact by the due date (inefficient sprint planning)
Author: Caelan
Mitigation: Ensure an efficient sprint planning structure and complete
Response: Be transparent and honest with stakeholders about why the artefacts are incomplete

Risk Description: Preparing a final presentation that does not adequately present final work
Author: Caelan
Mitigation: Allowing adequate time to complete the expected work, following the provided criteria and practicing before presentation day
Response: Be transparent and honest about the reasons why the presentation was not adequate

Risk Description: Having an incomplete team where more workload falls on some individuals
Author: Caelan
Mitigation: Ensure each members progress is being tracked with completed tasks and using communication strategies to ensure equal contributions.
Response: Escalate to teaching team if unable to communicate.

Risk Description: Having group conflict that negatively impacts the group dynamic and productivity
Author: Caelan
Mitigation: Ensure professionalism is maintained throughout, expectations are met to avoid frustration and any inappropriate behaviour is reported.
Response: Liaise with Tutor to find an appropriate resolution

Risk Description: Front and back end code does not align resulting in unused code or missing components
Author: Caelan
Mitigation: Front end and back end team should work collaboratively to ensure cohesion and final code should be tested
Response: Bring front end and back end teams together for a meeting to discuss how they will work collaboratively moving forward and how the misalignment will be corrected

Risk Description: Lack of team meeting minutes resulting in forgotten decisions and unclear expectations
Author: Caelan
Mitigation: Ensure meeting minutes are conducted each meeting and covers necessary points
Response: Acknowledge the shortfall and ensure that future meetings have adequate minutes recorded

Risk Description: Having a project that is not automated or an improvement from the previous group
Author: Caelan
Mitigation: Follow an efficient sprint plan to ensure progressive productivity and take on board  stakeholder feedback
Response: Be transparent and acknowledge the shortfalls of the project, as well as what the plan is to improve in the future

Risk Description: Being unable to communicate with group members resulting in a loss of progress
Author: Caelan
Mitigation: Follow the communication plan steps, try to contact the members through numerous methods, otherwise escalate
Response: Liaise with Tutor for assistance in finding a resolution

Risk Description: Not organising frequent team meetings to document work and follow sprint structure
Author: Caelan
Mitigation: Ensure at least one group meeting is organised every fortnight and the sprint structure is followed
Response: Acknowledge the shortfall in meetings and ensure that going forward there is at least one meeting per fortnight

Risk Description: Impacting stakeholder relationship by not maintaining professionalism.
Author: Caelan
Mitigation: Maintain professionalism with stakeholder both in person and over emails and communicate with group members who are not following this
Response: Acknowledge the unprofessionalism and ensure that processes are in place that it cannot happen in the future

Risk Description: Privacy risk, provided stakeholder information could be distributed to the wrong party
Author: Caelan
Mitigation: Ensure provided data is only added to a secure database or platform and do not share with unauthorised third parties
Response: Ensure that the stakeholder is made aware of the breach, as well as what has been done to clean up as best as possible

Risk Description: Developed software could be contaminated with malicious malware
Author: Caelan
Mitigation: Only use reputable and secure software and do not link GitHub or code to any third party untrusted sources.
Response: Once infection is identified, ensure the compromised version is scrubbed from all repositories and anyone who may have a copy is notified

Risk Description: Being unable to communicate with stakeholder resulting in unclear expectations
Author: Caelan
Mitigation: Ensure regular stakeholder meetings are conducted, work is efficiently communicated and feedback is received and applied
Response: Communicate with Tutor to find a resolution

Risk Description: Technical issues resulting in an incomplete final artefact
Author: Caelan
Mitigation: Ensure there are back up plans and other devices that can be accessed in case of failure
Response: Identify the newest version that is considered most feature complete without the technical issues, and explain why the issues occurred

Risk Description: Breach of any of the terms and conditions within the stakeholder contract
Author: Caelan
Mitigation: Ensure the contract was read and followed.
Response: Acknowledge the breach, rectify, and communicate what was done as part of the rectification

Risk Description: Lack of video clips for model training
Author: Harrison
Mitigation: Using existing provided small amount clips to train model
Response: Contact teaching team regarding having a major block
